## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Town and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance, and next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/CtVDcSLL6WMJ_syuEgzwFGiDUvsXGLsc?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [4 blogs delivered last Friday, now in final review; new review process working well](https://fathom.video/share/CtVDcSLL6WMJ_syuEgzwFGiDUvsXGLsc?tab=summary&timestamp=103.0)
  - [Looker dashboard set up for Town; 2 published blogs indexed, showing early positive signals](https://fathom.video/share/CtVDcSLL6WMJ_syuEgzwFGiDUvsXGLsc?tab=summary&timestamp=375.0)
  - [AI-generated images for blogs look promising, pending final approval](https://fathom.video/share/CtVDcSLL6WMJ_syuEgzwFGiDUvsXGLsc?tab=summary&timestamp=581.0)
  - [SME interviews planned to enhance content quality and model training](https://fathom.video/share/CtVDcSLL6WMJ_syuEgzwFGiDUvsXGLsc?tab=summary&timestamp=982.0)

## Topics

### Content Review Process

  - [New single-owner tax review process implemented, working efficiently](https://fathom.video/share/CtVDcSLL6WMJ_syuEgzwFGiDUvsXGLsc?tab=summary&timestamp=128.0)
  - [Tax reviewer also checks for Town voice before final review by Jean-Denis](https://fathom.video/share/CtVDcSLL6WMJ_syuEgzwFGiDUvsXGLsc?tab=summary&timestamp=138.0)
  - [Process aims for direct edits rather than comments to streamline workflow](https://fathom.video/share/CtVDcSLL6WMJ_syuEgzwFGiDUvsXGLsc?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)
  - [Team to provide feedback on accuracy and changes made, especially regarding new tax bill references](https://fathom.video/share/CtVDcSLL6WMJ_syuEgzwFGiDUvsXGLsc?tab=summary&timestamp=183.0)

### Content Performance

  - [Looker dashboard set up for Town team (Ryan, Lisa, Jean-Denis)](https://fathom.video/share/CtVDcSLL6WMJ_syuEgzwFGiDUvsXGLsc?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)
  - [2 blogs published last week, already indexed by Google (positive signal)](https://fathom.video/share/CtVDcSLL6WMJ_syuEgzwFGiDUvsXGLsc?tab=summary&timestamp=388.0)
  - [Non-branded search results filtering implemented to track high-intent traffic](https://fathom.video/share/CtVDcSLL6WMJ_syuEgzwFGiDUvsXGLsc?tab=summary&timestamp=442.0)
  - [Expectations: typically 2 weeks to see clicks for DA 20+ sites; for Town (new site), 3-4 weeks estimated](https://fathom.video/share/CtVDcSLL6WMJ_syuEgzwFGiDUvsXGLsc?tab=summary&timestamp=783.0)

### AI-Generated Images

  - [New workflow implemented in Atlas platform for image generation](https://fathom.video/share/CtVDcSLL6WMJ_syuEgzwFGiDUvsXGLsc?tab=summary&timestamp=515.0)
  - [Images based on brand guidelines shared by Anisha](https://fathom.video/share/CtVDcSLL6WMJ_syuEgzwFGiDUvsXGLsc?tab=summary&timestamp=547.0)
  - [Initial feedback positive: realistic, aligned with Town color palette](https://fathom.video/share/CtVDcSLL6WMJ_syuEgzwFGiDUvsXGLsc?tab=summary&timestamp=581.0)
  - [Final approval pending from Jean-Denis and potentially Tony (co-founder)](https://fathom.video/share/CtVDcSLL6WMJ_syuEgzwFGiDUvsXGLsc?tab=summary&timestamp=608.0)
  - [Town photo shoot scheduled for July 31st; turnaround time for final images estimated at 1+ week](https://fathom.video/share/CtVDcSLL6WMJ_syuEgzwFGiDUvsXGLsc?tab=summary&timestamp=692.0)

### SEO Strategy

  - [Internal linking prioritized to improve site structure and SEO](https://fathom.video/share/CtVDcSLL6WMJ_syuEgzwFGiDUvsXGLsc?tab=summary&timestamp=336.0)
  - [Indexing of new pages closely monitored](https://fathom.video/share/CtVDcSLL6WMJ_syuEgzwFGiDUvsXGLsc?tab=summary&timestamp=942.0)
  - [Domain authority expected to improve as site content grows](https://fathom.video/share/CtVDcSLL6WMJ_syuEgzwFGiDUvsXGLsc?tab=summary&timestamp=396.0)

### Subject Matter Expert Interviews

  - [Proposed to enhance content quality and inform model training](https://fathom.video/share/CtVDcSLL6WMJ_syuEgzwFGiDUvsXGLsc?tab=summary&timestamp=982.0)
  - [Previous interviews with Anjum and Jess provide foundation](https://fathom.video/share/CtVDcSLL6WMJ_syuEgzwFGiDUvsXGLsc?tab=summary&timestamp=1294.0)
  - Future focus areas:
      - [Vertical-specific expertise (e.g., real estate, healthcare, dental practices)](https://fathom.video/share/CtVDcSLL6WMJ_syuEgzwFGiDUvsXGLsc?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
      - [Entity selection for businesses](https://fathom.video/share/CtVDcSLL6WMJ_syuEgzwFGiDUvsXGLsc?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
      - [E-commerce](https://fathom.video/share/CtVDcSLL6WMJ_syuEgzwFGiDUvsXGLsc?tab=summary&timestamp=1207.0)
  - [Next steps: Darrell to interview Anjum for broader insights and recommendations on specific topics](https://fathom.video/share/CtVDcSLL6WMJ_syuEgzwFGiDUvsXGLsc?tab=summary&timestamp=1338.0)

## Next Steps
